claims.name: BS-Purity
claims.statement: binary_search(grid, x) depends ONLY on grid and x. It has no side effects. grid is read-only in the SCL template.

claims.name: BS-LoopInterchange
claims.statement: Swapping the loop order (o-then-i to i-then-o) does not change the computed values y[o].

claims.name: BS-ReductionFormula
claims.statement: For architecture [d_0,...,d_L], binary search count drops from sum_{l=1}^L d_l * d_{l-1} to sum_{l=1}^L d_{l-1}.

claims.name: FMA-SingleConsumer
claims.statement: The MatMul output v_mm[] is consumed ONLY by the Add node. No other IR node reads v_mm[].

claims.name: FMA-InlineSubstitution
claims.statement: Replacing the reference to v_mm[o] with its defining expression produces identical numerical results.

claims.name: FMA-MemorySaving
claims.statement: Fusion eliminates d_out * 4 bytes per KAN layer (one REAL = 4 bytes on S7-1200).

claims.name: LUT-SiLU-Bound
claims.statement: For SiLU(x) on [-5, 5] with 64-point uniform LUT, the linear interpolation error is bounded by epsilon_SiLU <= 0.003464.

claims.name: LUT-EXP-Bound
claims.statement: For EXP(x) on [-5, 5] with 64-point uniform LUT, the linear interpolation error is bounded by epsilon_EXP <= 0.4674.

claims.name: LUT-ClassPreservation
claims.statement: LUTizing EXP does not change the Argmax result for any input in the operational domain [-3, 3]^d.
